theme_archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Dashboard Soft Utility

layout_system.global: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-background font-body text-text_primary
layout_system.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col bg-sidebar_bg border-r border-border transition-all
layout_system.stats_bar: h-auto grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 border-b border-border bg-surface
layout_system.message_list: w-full md:w-1/2 lg:w-1/3 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-border flex flex-col bg-surface overflow-y-auto
layout_system.saas_panel: w-72 flex-shrink-0 border-l border-border bg-surface flex flex-col overflow-y-auto

components.stats_card: p-4 rounded-xl border border-border bg-surface shadow-sm flex flex-col hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.message_row: p-4 border-b border-border cursor-pointer hover:bg-blue-50/50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800/50 transition-colors flex flex-col gap-1 relative
components.compose_modal: fixed bottom-6 right-6 w-[500px] h-[600px] max-w-[calc(100vw-48px)] bg-surface rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-border flex flex-col z-50 overflow-hidden transform transition-transform
components.tab_item: px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium border-b-2 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap cursor-pointer
components.button_primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary_hover px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium shadow-sm transition-all
components.button_secondary: bg-surface border border-border text-text_primary hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all

micro_interactions.hover_states: All clickable items must have visual feedback (bg-color change, slight text darkening/lightening).
micro_interactions.active_states: Scale down slightly (scale-95) on click for buttons.
micro_interactions.transitions: Use `transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out` for most UI state changes.
micro_interactions.modal_animation: Slide up from bottom-right and fade in (translate-y-full to translate-y-0 opacity-0 to opacity-100).
micro_interactions.message_selection: Selected message in the list gets a distinct active background (e.g. bg-blue-100 dark:bg-blue-900/30) and primary text color for the subject.

testing.guideline: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='compose-btn').

assets_and_icons.empty_states: Use Lucide icons (e.g., Inbox, ShieldAlert, MailX) with oversized styling (w-16 h-16 text-slate-300 dark:text-slate-700) instead of stock photos for empty states to maintain a professional SaaS look. Include descriptive text below.
assets_and_icons.logo: Use a stylized text logo with 'Outfit' font and a primary colored mail/cloud icon from Lucide for the Voxyra Mail brand.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Build the layout using the defined 3-column + SaaS panel system. 2. Ensure horizontal/vertical toggle swaps the reading pane from right of message list (horizontal) to below message list or overlay. 3. Strictly use Manrope and Outfit fonts. 4. Implement light/dark mode explicitly applying the color map above via Tailwind arbitrary values or custom CSS vars. 5. Include data-testid on every clickable element and list item. 6. Integrate DirectAdmin mockup settings visually in the right SaaS Panel.
